title: FunillaPack
description: It is a modpack made for having a fun time with friends
body:
It is a modpack made for having a fun time with friends.

First version of the modpack.

- Better Nether 
- Better End 
- Psychedelicraft (We don't recommend any type of dr*g use. It does not condone chemical abuse, and no activities from the mod should be recreated in real life.) 
- AmbientSounds 
- Better Clouds 
- ESSENTIAL Mod 
- Infinite Trading 
- Simple Voice Chat

and more
